resources.string: Log out
Sign out of your account on this device
Manage technician info who performs maintenance work
Keep your records synced across devices
Export and share your logbook
Advanced controls, synced across your devices
Log in
Connect your records to an account to sync and back them up
Syncing your records…
Syncing complete
Couldn't complete sync. Please try again.
App Version: %1$s
Remove this account from this device
Feature Lab
Advanced controls. Changes sync across your devices.
Technician Management
Enable the technician roster and performed-by picker on maintenance logs.
Attachment Uploads
Allow attaching files and links to maintenance records.
Email Export Delivery
Upload exports to the cloud and email a download link. When off, exports stay on this device only.
Account Upgrade
Let guest users create an account and sync their on-device records to it.
Adaptive Layout
Use the adaptive web/tablet shell (sidebar & multi-pane) on large screens instead of the single-column layout.
